summary: Iteration 19 — Validated new linear 9-step Cockpit Journey (replaces 50-prompt blocks). Backend: 8/8 active tests passed on /api/sites/{id}/{pricing-analysis,financial-forecast,upsell-recommendations} (1 scoping test skipped — only 1 site exists in wiped DB). Frontend: CockpitJourney renders all 9 steps with correct hrefs, /pricing /forecast /upsells pages load, Concepteur sidebar has no legacy Sourcing/Duplicate/Ads Copy/Connect AliExpress entries. Claude pricing-analysis call SUCCEEDED end-to-end (~30s, snapshot persisted).

ui_bugs.issue: Header still displays legacy counter '0 / 50 étapes validées' (with 50-step progress bar) directly above the new CockpitJourney panel showing '0/9 étapes complétées'. Two competing progress indicators are confusing for the user.

After Claude pricing-analysis succeeds and persists, returning to /sites/{id} sometimes shows pricing step as not done (CTA still 'Lancer l'analyse IA' and counter 0/9). Initial measure during test reported 1/9 then a second navigation showed 0/9 — suspect a race between CockpitJourney's internal Promise.all GET and React state hydration of `pricing` flag, or projection bug. Verify GET /api/sites/{id}/pricing-analysis returns the stored snapshot consistently.

action_items: Remove or hide the legacy '0 / 50 étapes validées' counter and progress bar from SiteDetail header now that <CockpitJourney /> owns progress display (handoff said legacy steps collection stays in DB but should not be displayed).
Investigate intermittent CockpitJourney refresh: ensure pricing/forecast/upsells GETs return the saved snapshot reliably and the `done` flag toggles green after first POST without manual refresh.
critical_code_review_comments: cockpit_tools.py uses bare `except Exception` in _claude_json — fine for graceful degradation but logs the full traceback (good).

_claude_json silently returns None for both 'no API key' and 'API failure' cases — caller raises 502, but distinguishing 402 (budget) vs 502 (other) would give cleaner UX. Currently any LLM failure surfaces as 502.

financial_forecast: avg_cpa fallback is `max(avg_price * 0.30, 30)` — fine, but if niche_analysis has no entries for selected_countries this fallback is silently used; consider exposing this in the response so user knows the forecast is heuristic.
Three new endpoints all do `_check_site_access` upfront — good consistency. ObjectId not exposed (uses {_id: 0} projection consistently).
SitePricing.jsx uses `window.alert(error)` for failures — replace with a proper toast/inline error block to match the rest of the app's UX.
CockpitJourney.jsx imports `CurrencyEur` from @phosphor-icons/react — verify the icon name exists in the installed version (no console error observed, so OK).
SiteDetail.jsx still mounts the legacy 50-step progress header — needs cleanup (see action item).

success_rate.frontend: 95% — all flows reachable; minor counter sync/legacy header issue

test_credentials: Concepteur: concepteur@conceptfactory.fr / Concepteur2026! · Site: 65964cb0-7a1a-4c11-9644-1ad8f2371d48 (Test Fauteuils Releveurs, FR, niche fauteuils releveurs)
seed_data_creation: Backend test populated design.pricing_analysis on the test site via successful Claude call (~30s). No products were created — forecast/upsells correctly returned 400.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new cockpit endpoints work. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is currently FUNCTIONAL (Claude responded under 30s on pricing-analysis). data-testids: cockpit-journey, journey-step-{pricing,import,upsells,forecast,branding,pages,content,seo,qa}, pricing-run, pricing-result. Forecast/Upsells pages don't yet expose data-testids on their main CTA buttons — recommend adding for stability. Single test site exists; for proper site-scoping verification create a 2nd Concepteur or 2nd site.
rca of the issue: N/A — no critical bug. Minor UI cleanup needed for legacy 50-step header on SiteDetail.
